Three claude rows affected: claude_why_farcall_clobbers_hl (CLAUDE.md §3.2), claude_why_cross_bank_call_silent_garbage (CLAUDE.md §3.4), claude_why_stat_stage_byte_not_multiplier (Stat-math trap —).
